extension.description: Unified plugin: Skin Installer, Skin Switcher, Userdata Backup & Restore, OpenWizard, and ABUKARIM Wizard.
extension.news: v1.6.9.0 - First-run: CoreELEC reboot prompt 10s after skin loads (YES reboots so autostart.sh runs). v1.6.8.9 - Auto-run first-run on new build apply via shipped resources/build.id (wipe-proof self-trigger). - Re-enabled xbmc.service so first-run triggers automatically on boot. v1.6.8.8 - Skin installer (first-run + manual): auto-confirm YES on the final "Keep this skin?" dialog. v1.6.8.7 - Removed AF3 ColorHighlight patch entry. v1.6.8.6 - POV/Umbrella players switched to RunPlugin (search-mode caused GetDirectory loop). All 4 players now consistent. v1.6.8.5 - Patcher: addon_data target support. Deploy 4 TMDbHelper player JSONs (POV/Umbrella search-mode) post-restore. v1.6.8.4 - TMDbHelper: suppress "not playable" popup for source-select players (dummy strm-gate fix). v1.6.8.3 - RedLight sources_results: dark unfocused card (FF1F2020) - fixes white rows in TIDB results window. v1.6.8.2 - AF3: dark focus highlight (ff202020) fixes white select-dialog rows (TIDB/Seren etc). v1.6.6 - Removed all RedLight patch entries and theme-reset logic.
